name: MITAPI 2015-2010 Agricultural Land Use Difference Dataset (0.1x0.1 Degree)
description: Metadata catalog entry for a NetCDF file containing agricultural land use difference data derived from the MITAPI project, comparing the years 2015 and 2010 at a 0.1x0.1 degree spatial resolution. The record provides file access details including the filename, format, size, and direct download URL for the dataset published by Dasadhikari et al. in 2019.
